facts: NIT Patna has two campuses: Old Campus at Ashok Rajpath, near Patna University, Patna - 800005 and New Campus at Bihta, Sikandarpur Village, Patna - 801103.

mess.schedule_highlights: Mon-Thu breakfast includes Paratha/Puri/Idli/Aloo Paratha with milk, tea, banana, sprouts. Lunch has Dal, Rice, Roti, Sabji, Bhujia, Salad, Seasonal Fruit. Dinner has Dal/Paneer/Kheer with Rice, Roti, Salad. Friday has Halwa+Puri for breakfast, Sewai for dinner. Saturday has Chole Bhature for breakfast, Kadhi Pakora for dinner. Sunday is special: Masala Dosa/Uttapam for breakfast, Veg Biryani+Kofta for lunch, Manchurian+Ice Cream (80ml) for dinner.
mess.notes: Evening snacks include Tea+Coffee+Biscuits daily from 5-6 PM. Seasonal fruits served daily. Minimum 3 salad items. Pickles served with every lunch and dinner.

first_semester.includes: Institute caution money Rs 10,000 (refundable), Development fee Rs 30,000, Hostel fee Rs 12,000, Mess advance Rs 20,000, Hostel security Rs 6,000 (refundable), and various other fees

final_even_semester.note: Includes Alumni Activity Fund Rs 1,500 and Convocation Fee Rs 3,000

exemptions: SC/ST/PwD students exempted from tuition fee.
Income below Rs 1 lakh: full tuition remission.

facts: High speed WiFi with good coverage in both hostels and college.
Over 20+ clubs including both tech and cultural clubs.
Popular clubs: Coding, Robotics, Drama, Dance, Photography.
Annual sports and cultural fest conducted every year.
Old campus: Paid laundry available in hostels.
New campus: Washing machines are available.

transport.airport: Jay Prakash Narayan International Airport, Patna

restaurants.delivery: Swiggy and Zomato likely available (Patna metro city).

language_climate.climate: Usually moderate. Slightly hot during summer.
